source.title: 笔记运营实战小课
source.processing: public video metadata plus local ASR plus manual synthesis; no full transcript or course images retained

evidence_scale.warning: The course supports that the platform taught this merchant workflow in 2024; it does not establish 2026 ranking weights or universal causal effects.

mechanisms.name: role_audience_value_before_format
actions: state who the account helps
mix education and Q&A into product content when explanation is required

mechanisms.name: benchmark_transferable_parts
actions: separate topic, carrier, proof and monetization references
prefer comparable current accounts

mechanisms.name: one_primary_value_promise
inputs: primary practical, economic-risk or emotional value
actions: write one-sentence reader outcome
align cover, title and body to that outcome

mechanisms.name: distribution_job_first
actions: use identity, scene or evidence gap for feed discovery
use natural entity-problem-scene-answer wording for search

mechanisms.name: carrier_follows_job_and_proof
actions: comparison uses a uniform protocol
tutorial proves a path
atmosphere uses real scene
unboxing answers arrival-state uncertainty

mechanisms.name: fact_title_then_rhetorical_compression
actions: write a literal fact title first
choose one entry: information gap, pain, bounded emotion or direct answer
use numbers or symbols only when they reduce ambiguity

mechanisms.name: promise_proof_answer_closure
actions: confirm relevance on page one
organize evidence and actions by reader question
end with a decision or next step
failure_conditions: comparison promised but only feelings delivered

mechanisms.name: comments_as_objection_and_topic_research
actions: answer first then ask one genuine follow-up
turn repeated objections into FAQ or next topic

mechanisms.name: fixed_window_own_account_learning
actions: use a consistent configurable window
change one main variable when feasible
locate the leaking funnel stage before editing

historical_course_examples.instruction: Do not use as a Skill default; declare a run-specific window from account, task, reporting latency and business-cycle constraints.

rejected_or_historical_claims.claim: fixed 7, 8 or 14 day distribution windows and adding a product link on day 8
rejected_or_historical_claims.reason: historical merchant-course statement without current scoped official verification

rejected_or_historical_claims.claim: feed traffic fades after about one month while search remains for half a year
rejected_or_historical_claims.reason: useful conceptual contrast but unsupported fixed duration

rejected_or_historical_claims.claim: collage, decorative text, high saturation or an attractive hand model inherently drives traffic
rejected_or_historical_claims.reason: creative advice, contradicted as a sufficient condition by live high-low public samples

rejected_or_historical_claims.claim: tagging friends or group-seeding proves free organic traffic
rejected_or_historical_claims.reason: external seeding is a confound and can become engagement manipulation

rejected_or_historical_claims.claim: public likes, saves and comments reveal recommendation weights
